name: Assault Mode
description:
3x Psi-Reflector
1x Assault Beast
1x Assault Mode Activate
0-3x Assault Sentinel
0-3x Crimson Blader/Assault Mode
0-3x Duel Evolution - Assault Zone
**Flexible ratios depending on the space you have, the more space you have the more Reflector searchers you can add
**Get to Psi-Reflector, search Beast, add Activate, revive Beast and change its level
Thanks to Luiz Alexandre for the info!
